s0.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface s0.

s1.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface s1.

s2.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface s2.

s3.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface s3.

s4.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface s4.

s5.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface s5.

blur-base-light.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface special blur base light.

blur-base-dark.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface special blur base dark.

secondary-alpha-base.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface special secondary alpha base.

primary-high-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface primary high em.

primary-base-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface primary base em.

primary-low-em-alpha.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface primary low em alpha.

primary-base-em-alpha.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface primary base em alpha.

danger-med-em.$description: M3 error tone 50: mid-emphasis danger surface.

danger-base-em.$description: M3 error tone 95: faintest danger tint.

danger-low-em-alpha.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface danger low em alpha.

danger-base-em-alpha.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface danger base em alpha.

disabled-high-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface disabled high em.

disabled-med-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface disabled med em.

disabled-low-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface disabled low em.

disabled-base-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface disabled base em.

hover-overlay.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface hover overlay.

hover-overlay-inverse.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface hover overlay inverse.

primary-high-em-hover.$description: Material 3 semantic color for surface primary high em hover.

danger-high-em-hover.$description: Hover of the M3 error surface: error tone 30.

high-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for text high em.

med-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for text med em.

low-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for text low em.

base-em.$description: M3 neutral-variant tone 60 (dark-scheme outline tone) as faintest text.

primary-on-primary-light.$description: M3 md.sys.color.on-primary-container (primary tone 30, current baseline — the 2023 color update moved on-*-container from tone 10 to 30).

secondary-on-primary.$description: Material 3 semantic color for text secondary on primary.

secondary-on-primary-light.$description: Material 3 semantic color for text secondary on primary light.

text-on-neutral.$description: Material 3 semantic color for text text on neutral.

primary-high-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for text primary high em.

primary-med-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for text primary med em.

primary-low-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for text primary low em.

primary-base-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for text primary base em.

danger-high-em.$description: High-emphasis danger text: M3 error tone 30 (AA over the error-container tints).

danger-med-em.$description: M3 md.sys.color.error (error tone 40) as danger text.

danger-low-em.$description: M3 error tone 70: low-emphasis danger text (ramp-position parity with onmars danger.300).

danger-base-em.$description: M3 error tone 90: faintest danger text.

high-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline high em.

strong.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline strong.

med-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline med em.

base-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline base em.

primary-high-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline primary high em.

primary-med-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline primary med em.

primary-low-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline primary low em.

primary-base-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline primary base em.

primary-low-em-alpha.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline primary low em alpha.

primary-base-em-alpha.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline primary base em alpha.

danger-low-em.$description: M3 error tone 80 outline (on-error-container dark tone).

danger-low-em-alpha.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline danger low em alpha.

danger-base-em-alpha.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline danger base em alpha.

primary-button-top.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline primary button top.

primary-button-bottom.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline primary button bottom.

secondary-button-top.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline secondary button top.

secondary-button-bottom.$description: Material 3 semantic color for outline secondary button bottom.

high-em.$description: M3 md.sys.color.scrim (black) at the M3 scrim opacity (32%).

high-em-inverse.$description: Material 3 semantic color for overlay high em inverse.

med-em.$description: Material 3 semantic color for overlay med em.

med-em-inverse.$description: Material 3 semantic color for overlay med em inverse.

shadow.$description: Material 3 semantic color for elevation shadow.

shadow-med.$description: Material 3 semantic color for elevation shadow med.

shadow-dark.$description: Material 3 semantic color for elevation shadow dark.

e1.$description: M3 md.sys.elevation.level1 (key + ambient pair). Identical in dark: M3 dark expresses elevation via surface tint (approximated by the mapped surface containers), not stronger shadows.

e2.$description: M3 md.sys.elevation.level2. Identical in dark (surface tint carries dark elevation).

e3.$description: M3 md.sys.elevation.level3. Identical in dark (surface tint carries dark elevation).

e4.$description: M3 md.sys.elevation.level4. Identical in dark (surface tint carries dark elevation).

e5.$description: M3 md.sys.elevation.level5. Identical in dark (surface tint carries dark elevation).

e6.$description: M3 md.sys.elevation.level5 (the M3 scale ends at level 5; ki e6 reuses it).

backdrop-blur.$description: M3 surfaces are opaque, never glass: the component backdrop blur is disabled (blur 0). Replaces the MarsUI Blur/24 glass backdrop.

shadow.$description: M3 md.sys.elevation.level1 as the primary component resting effect: flat elevation replaces the MarsUI glass drop + inner White/12 highlight (M3 has no glass inner strokes).
M3 md.sys.elevation.level2 as the primary component hover effect (+1 level on hover, M3 elevated interaction pattern). Replaces the MarsUI glass hover stack.
M3 md.sys.elevation.level1 as the secondary component resting effect: flat elevation replaces the MarsUI glass drop + inner White/3 highlight.
M3 md.sys.elevation.level2 as the secondary component hover effect (+1 level on hover). Replaces the MarsUI glass hover stack.

fast.$description: M3 md.sys.motion.duration.short2 (100ms) as the fast interaction duration.

out.$description: M3 md.sys.motion.easing.standard-decelerate as the decelerate curve.

hover.$description: M3 hover state layer: 8% of md.sys.color.on-surface.

focus.$description: M3 focus state layer: 12% of md.sys.color.on-surface.

pressed.$description: M3 pressed state layer: 12% of md.sys.color.on-surface (shares the focus value).

dragged.$description: M3 dragged state layer: 16% of md.sys.color.on-surface.
